title: Visualizing the Core Axioms of a Group
description: A diagram illustrating the four fundamental axioms (closure, associativity, identity, and inverse) that define an algebraic group, as covered in Grimaldi's Discrete Mathematical Structures.
relationships: Operation * is applied to elements a and b (a*b) and the result is also in G (Closure)
There exists an identity element e such that a*e = e*a = a
For every element a, there exists an inverse a⁻¹ such that a*a⁻¹ = a⁻¹*a = e
